steps.title: Convert to years after 1993
steps.content: Let $t$ be years after $1993$. Then $1993$ is $t=0$, $2013$ is $t=20$, and $2017$ is $t=24$. The known points for the linear model are $(0,52)$ and $(20,219)$, where $y$ is in thousands.

steps.title: Use the fitted line to predict 2017
steps.content: The regression gives $m=8.35$ and $b=52$, so $y=8.35t+52$. For $2017$, plug in $t=24$: $$y=8.35(24)+52=252.4.$$ Rounded to the nearest whole number, this is $252$ thousand.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The value $252.4$ rounds to $252$, so the answer is 252.
